fields.summary: Return SubClusterId in FederationStateStoreFacade#addApplicationHomeSubCluster for Router Failover
Enable YARN RM scale out via federation using multiple RM's

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description:
This JIRA tracks the returning of SubClusterId from FederationStateStoreFacade#addApplicationHomeSubCluster. 
in the design of [YARN-3659|https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/YARN-3659], to handle better fail-over scenario the response needs SubClusterId. This is bubbling up the change in YARN-5519.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

fields.summary: Add SubClusterId in AddApplicationHomeSubClusterResponse for Router Failover

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved
